rows.label: qev041604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welc... No, welcome back, mo! I
am so glad you returned, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0002
rows.name:
Did you find the "huge thing," mo?
What happened to the cargo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mo-mo-mo-mo~! This is it, mo! This is
it, mo! This is undoubtedly it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is the lost greatest treasure
of the Nopon people, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0005
rows.name:
...... ...That was a lie, mo. I got
a little carried away, mo. But that
is exactly how happy I am, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0006
rows.name:
What did you do about the "huge
thing," mo? Did you fight it, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0007
rows.name:
Mo-mo-mo-mo~!? You defeated it, mo?
You are actually quite skilled, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0008
rows.name:
Kutta was really lucky to ask you
for help, mo. That is an indispensable
talent for business, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0009
rows.name:
Regardless, with this, Courier Kutta can
resume work with a cool face as if nothing
happened, without losing any trust, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0010
rows.name:
You are a lifesaver... no, a job-saver, mo! I am sure
something good will happen to you in the future, mo! Though
I have no idea what kind of good thing it will be, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now, I am off, mo! Courier Kutta's
selling point is safe, secure,
and immediate delivery, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041604_MSG0012
rows.name:
Full speed ahead towards a
thriving business, mo~![ST:wait ]
